hook.summary: A group of six attractive, stylishly dressed characters pose and laugh together.
hook.visual_action: Characters are shown in a group shot, smiling and laughing with slight animations like hair flips and posing.

scene_flow: Group shot of six attractive characters in formal wear posing and laughing.
Camera zooms in slightly on the male characters in the back row.
Transition to a new group of seven characters in a different art style against a purple background.
Final title card appears with the game logo and a call to action button.
audience_proxy: Young adults who enjoy reality TV drama and interactive romance stories.
